ingredients.text: Waten Sugan Wheat Floun Canola Oil

ingredients_debug: Waten Sugan Wheat Floun Canola Oil
ingredients_text: Cake (78%) [Waten Sugan Wheat Floun Canola Oil, Cocoa Powder Egg, Dextrose, Raising Agents (450, 500), Thickener (1422), Natural Chocolate Flavour (Colour (150a), Humectant (1520)), Salt], Ganache (21%) [Dark Choc (51%) (Sugar; Certified Sustainable Palm Oil, Cocoa Powder, Emulsifiers (322 Soy, 492), Salt), Thickened Cream (Cream, Mineral Salts (450, 500), Thickener (400))]. Choc Decoration (1%) [White Choc (Soy), Canola Oil, Dark Choc (Soy)].
